case_title: COHEN, STEPHEN DDS et al VS BLANCO, JOSE MANUEL

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $907.88 FILED BY COHEN, STEPHEN DDS WONG, SHANNON DDS, APDC AS TO DEFENDANT BLANCO, JOSE MANUEL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-24-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BLANCO, JOSE MANUEL

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF COHEN, STEPHEN DDS WONG, SHANNON DDS, APDC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BLANCO, JOSE MANUEL $907.88 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $972.88, FOR NONPAYMENT OF DENTAL SERVICES STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT BLANCO, JOSE MANUEL
